name: memex
description: Codex plugin for memex — sync AI chat history, navigate the memory base, and build a user profile from accumulated memory

interface.shortDescription: Sync chats, search memory, build profiles
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for memex sync, memory recall, and USER.md profile generation from archived AI conversations.
defaultPrompt: Sync my Codex and Claude Code chats into memex.
Find the conversation where I decided a technical approach.
Build a USER.md profile from everything in memex.
